summary: Full audit of SOPRALLUOGHI, PERIZIE, PREVENTIVATORE, RILIEVI modules completed. Backend: 36/36 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 4 pages working correctly with proper data display.

issues: Minor HTML hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> and <span> cannot be child of <tbody>. This is a React rendering issue but doesn't affect functionality.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix HTML structure in SopralluogoWizardPage.js around line 891-893 to avoid hydration warnings (span wrapping tr elements in tbody)
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up: sopralluogo, perizia, preventivo, commessa, rilievo (all prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SOPRALLUOGHI, PERIZIE, PREVENTIVATORE, RILIEVI modules fully tested. All CRUD operations working. AI endpoints (analizza, analyze-photos, analyze-drawing) were SKIPPED as they require real images and GPT-4o API credits. The existing sopralluogo sop_546b0934db54 has AI analysis data that was verified. Preventivatore /calcola endpoint (pure math) tested fully. The accetta flow creates commessa with normativa_tipo=EN_1090 and classe_exc=EXC2 correctly.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/sopralluoghi/ - list with status and conformita %
POST /api/perizie/ - create with tipo_danno, auto-generates voci_costo
POST /api/preventivatore/accetta/{id} - accept and create commessa EN_1090
POST /api/preventivatore/confronta - compare AI vs manual preventivi
POST /api/rilievi/ - create (note: survey_date must be date only, not datetime)

features_verified: Wizard tabs (Cliente & Luogo, Foto, Analisi AI, Risultati)
Table with columns (Numero, Data, Cliente, Tipo Danno, Totale, Stato)
Wizard steps (Carica Disegno, Materiali, Margini & Calcolo, Genera Preventivo)
Manual estimation section (Peso stimato, Tipologia struttura)

regression_tests.sopralluogo_ai_analysis_structure: PASSED - AI analysis has correct structure with tipo_chiusura, descrizione_generale, rischi (zona, gravita, problema, norma_riferimento, soluzione), dispositivi_presenti, dispositivi_mancanti, conformita_percentuale
regression_tests.preventivo_from_sopralluogo: PASSED - Preventivo linked to sopralluogo has correct structure with lines, totals, sopralluogo_id

integration_test.preventivo_to_commessa_flow: PASSED - Created preventivo via /calcola + /genera-preventivo, then /accetta created commessa with normativa_tipo=EN_1090 and classe_exc=EXC2
